sys_script_include.description:
Integration Engine for Service Graph Connectors and Workflow Data Fabric.
Supports: - Kubernetes cluster sync via Service Graph - GitHub/GitLab repository integration - AWS/GCP/Azure cloud resource discovery - Terraform state synchronization - PagerDuty/Datadog/Slack webhooks - Real-time entity sync with Workflow Data Fabric
sys_script_include.name: IDPIntegrationEngine
